title: SLAM-based Autonomous Mobile Robot System
description: A mobile robot system created as a major project at IIEST Shibpur, utilizing OpenCV, A* algorithm, and Python to enable the robot to navigate complex environments and make informed decisions in real-time.
techStack: Python, Open CV, A* algorithm, Raspberry Pi

title: Real-Time Hand Gesture Recognition (ISL)
description: Built a real-time hand gesture recognition system for 35 Indian Sign Language gestures using live webcam input. Trained on 42,745 images and optimized the inference pipeline to achieve 25 FPS with sub-40 ms latency.

title: Audex - Audio Transcription Telegram Bot
description: Developed a Telegram bot that transcribes voice messages using speech_recognition and offers optional text-to-speech with pyttsx3.

title: Prasanth Kumar - Portfolio Website
description: The current portfolio you are viewing. A minimalist portfolio designed with a focus on responsive user experience.
